title: Welcome
text:
Test


Code
library(ggplot2)

set.seed(42)

df <- data.frame(
  time = rep(1:10, 2),
  outcome = c(
    1:5 + rnorm(5, 0, 0.15), 6.8, 7.6, 8.5, 9.3, 10.2,           # observed (treated)
    1:5 + rnorm(5, 0, 0.15), 5.4, 5.8, 6.1, 6.5, 6.9             # counterfactual (estimated)
  ),
  series = rep(c("Observed (treated)", "Counterfactual (estimated)"), each = 10)
)

ggplot(df, aes(time, outcome, color = series, linetype = series)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey60") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#3a6b8a", "#b0bcc4")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time",
    y = "Outcome",
    color = NULL,
    linetype = NULL,
    title = "The counterfactual is estimated, never observed"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")








Figure 1: Observed outcome vs. an estimated counterfactual for a single unit
